# Resume Snapshot

**James Almeida**  
AI Consultant and Software Engineer

## Focus Areas
- AI strategy and implementation
- Agentic workflows and automation
- Frontend architecture with React and TypeScript
- Product-minded design and UX execution

## Recent Roles
- **AI Consultant, General Systems Ventures** — November 2025 to Present
- **Human Data Specialist / AI Trainer, xAI** — August 2024 to November 2025
- **Software Engineer, Leaf Group / Society6** — November 2018 to March 2023
- **Frontend Developer, iROKOtv** — March 2016 to May 2018
- **Web Developer / Designer, Datadog** — January 2015 to March 2016

## Download
[Download the full resume PDF](/resume.pdf)

If you'd like, I can summarize the resume for a specific audience, like **startup founder**, **product team**, or **AI consulting client**.
